_comment: Operator layout for live scanning. Import into Foxglove Studio (Layouts -> Import). Connect via foxglove_bridge ws://<nuc-ip>:8765. TODO(copilot): tune the 3D panel color modes once real topic names are confirmed.

/scanner/coverage._note: intensity 0..1 = coverage completeness; red/low = needs more passes

Indicator!health.title: Tracking Health
Indicator!health._note: Float32 in [0,1]. Green > 0.4, amber 0.2-0.4, red < 0.2 (see coverage.yaml thresholds).
